3204300.name: Know Your Pride
3204300.description:
Know Your Pride is a first-person live TV trivia game show experience. Step onto the set as the star contestant, where questions might range anywhere from pop to queer culture but beware picking the wrong answer might lead to unexpected consequences. The host seems friendly enough but don’t be fooled, they love nothing more than to mess with you.

> PRE-ALPHA DISCLAIMER

The current version of the game as shown in the screenshots features pre-alpha, developer placeholder graphics. These visuals are currently simple and subject to major changes as development continues.

> DISCLAIMER

This game is designed for both entertainment and educational purposes. But some content may be presented in an exaggerated or humorous manner and should not be taken as factual. All information is curated from reliable sources. If you have any concerns or encounter any issues, please let us know. We are committed to updating the game as needed to maintain quality and respect it deserves.

英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言

categories.description: 无需应对快速反应事件
